A small set of columns appears to need cleanup before reporting.

dataset_overview: The dataset has 84922 rows and 25 columns with memory usage around 80.88 MB. The overall quality score is 99.5 out of 100. Main issues include missing data and potential high-cardinality or identifier-like columns.
